captions.formal: A golden autumn boulevard with city traffic moving beneath trees.
captions.sarcastic: Ah yes, another breathtaking street, now with 40% more leaves.
captions.humorous_tech: Rush hour rendering at 25fps, and traffic is still the bottleneck.
captions.humorous_non_tech: The trees threw a leaf party and nobody offered to sweep up.

captions.formal: A result for a task that was never requested.
captions.humorous_tech: This object has no matching key in the request map.
captions.humorous_non_tech: Nobody ordered this, but here it is anyway.
